calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Masenga in Propria Persona via CourtCall

The Court noted the issue of whether payment of $45,000.00 to assignee was reasonable. Mr. Masenga stated that he spoke with Ms. Rabinoff, they have nothing more to add, and would like to submit on the pleadings. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Joseph. Not reported.
